chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4969 of 2016 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on Nazir report dated 01.11.2016 2. For order on office objection 3. For hearing of CMA No.24459/2016 4. For hearing of main case 21.03.2025 Ms. Dilkhurram Shaheen, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel this petition may be disposed of with directions that the fate of security shall be subject to the outcome of SCRA 470 of 2016. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
